'''âd-b-m-k''' ('''kadabmekoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:tug|tug]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-b-m-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tug|tug]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âd-b-m-k
|-
! Lemma
| kadabmekoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidabmekoko|thidabmekoko]] || [[word:jidabmekoko|jidabmekoko]] || [[word:shidabmekoko|shidabmekoko]] || [[word:kidabmekoko|kidabmekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudabmekoko|thuthudabmekoko]] || [[word:jujudabmekoko|jujudabmekoko]] || [[word:shushudabmekoko|shushudabmekoko]] || [[word:kukudabmekoko|kukudabmekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudabmekoko|thudabmekoko]] || [[word:judabmekoko|judabmekoko]] || [[word:shudabmekoko|shudabmekoko]] || [[word:kudabmekoko|kudabmekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudabmekoko|thudabmekoko]] || [[word:judabmekoko|judabmekoko]] || [[word:shudabmekoko|shudabmekoko]] || [[word:kudabmekoko|kudabmekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedabmekoko|thedabmekoko]] || [[word:jedabmekoko|jedabmekoko]] || [[word:shedabmekoko|shedabmekoko]] || [[word:kedabmekoko|kedabmekoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodabmekoko|thodabmekoko]] || [[word:jodabmekoko|jodabmekoko]] || [[word:shodabmekoko|shodabmekoko]] || [[word:kodabmekoko|kodabmekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodabmekoko|thodabmekoko]] || [[word:jodabmekoko|jodabmekoko]] || [[word:shodabmekoko|shodabmekoko]] || [[word:kodabmekoko|kodabmekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdabmekoko|thĂŠdabmekoko]] || [[word:jĂŠdabmekoko|jĂŠdabmekoko]] || [[word:shĂŠdabmekoko|shĂŠdabmekoko]] || [[word:kĂŠdabmekoko|kĂŠdabmekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadabmekoko|thathadabmekoko]] || [[word:jajadabmekoko|jajadabmekoko]] || [[word:shashadabmekoko|shashadabmekoko]] || [[word:kakadabmekoko|kakadabmekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadabmekoko|thadabmekoko]] || [[word:jadabmekoko|jadabmekoko]] || [[word:shadabmekoko|shadabmekoko]] || [[word:kadabmekoko|kadabmekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadabmekoko|thadabmekoko]] || [[word:jadabmekoko|jadabmekoko]] || [[word:shadabmekoko|shadabmekoko]] || [[word:kadabmekoko|kadabmekoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shadabmekithi|shadabmekithi]] || [[word:shadabmekiji|shadabmekiji]] || [[word:shadabmekishi|shadabmekishi]] || [[word:shadabmekiki|shadabmekiki]]
